finding_results.notes: Compressed the proof chain into the opening manifestations and repurposed the post-door material into a rule-and-cost beat. summary: Chapter 4 was structurally compressed so the Manor's favoritism is proved early and then escalates into a rule with consequence: Narcissa recognizes the behavior, warns Draco not to force the new door, and Draco's decision to test it ends with the house locking him out of the library. Narcissa's leaked calibration dialogue was fully replaced, and the sentence-level tic pass removed the flagged em-dash density, pronoun-openers, and 'the way' repetition.
